metadata.description: The portable dev-loop kit: fix (triage → branch → implement) and ship (clean → verify → review → commit → PR → babysit → reflect) — from a reported bug or a finished change to a green, mergeable PR. Self-contained and installable on any SKILL.md-compatible agent.

plugins.name: ship-kit
plugins.description: /ship orchestrates simplify → verify → code-review → smart-commit → branch hygiene → PR → babysit → reflect; /fix triages a bug with parallel sub-agents then branches, implements, and ships it; /babysit drives a GitHub PR to a fresh APPROVED + CI-green + mergeable state. Bundles triage/simplify/verify/code-review/yolo so it runs without relying on pre-installed skills. Pass --yolo to run hands-off.
